/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tcpClient.dir/TcpClientThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpClient.dir/tcpClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpClient.dir/TcpClientConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tcpClient.dir/TcpClientConnector.cpp.o -o ../../bin/tcpClient  ../../lib/libApplCore.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a ../../lib/libNetUtils.a ../../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../../lib/libConfigUtils.a ../../lib/libminiupnpc.a ../../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../../lib/libSysUtils.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a -ldl ../../lib/libspdlog.a
